requirement_topic.en: Radio Equipment Directive — CE Marking & NMHH National Enforcement (Hungary)
requirement_topic.zh: 无线设备指令 — CE标志及NMHH国家执法（匈牙利）
requirement_topic.zht: 無線設備指令 — CE標誌及NMHH國家執法（匈牙利）

summary.en: Hungary is an EU member state and the EU Radio Equipment Directive (RED) 2014/53/EU applies in full without national derogation. CE marking is mandatory for all radio equipment placed on the Hungarian market. The national competent authority for RED enforcement and spectrum management is NMHH (Nemzeti Média- és Hírközlési Hatóság — National Media and Infocommunications Authority), established under Act C of 2003 on Electronic Communications (as amended). NMHH manages frequency spectrum allocation, radio type-approval coordination, and RED enforcement for radio and telecom equipment. Hungary is a major EU electronics manufacturing hub — NMHH enforcement is active and well-resourced, with Samsung, LG, and Bosch operating significant manufacturing facilities that heighten local supply chain scrutiny. The applicable harmonised radio standards are EN 300 328 v2.2.2 for 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi and Bluetooth and EN 301 893 v2.1.1 for 5 GHz RLAN. Compliance with these harmonised standards grants presumption of conformity with RED Art. 3.2. A signed EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC) in Hungarian (or with a Hungarian translation available) must accompany the product. Product labelling must include Hungarian language instructions and safety markings as required by national consumer protection law. MSZT (Magyar Szabványügyi Testület — Hungarian Standards Institution) adopts EU harmonised standards as MSZ EN equivalents. CCC, SRRC, and FCC are not recognised by NMHH as substitutes for RED/CE.
summary.zh: 匈牙利是欧盟成员国，欧盟无线设备指令（RED）2014/53/EU在全国全面适用，无国家豁免。CE标志是向匈牙利市场投放所有无线电设备的强制要求。负责RED执法和频谱管理的国家主管机关是NMHH（Nemzeti Média- és Hírközlési Hatóság——匈牙利国家媒体与信息通信管理局），依据2003年C号《电子通信法》（经修订）设立。NMHH负责频率频谱分配、无线电型式核准协调及无线电和电信设备的RED执法。匈牙利是欧盟主要电子制造中心——NMHH执法积极且资源充足，三星、LG和博世在此设有大型制造工厂，进一步加大了本地供应链审查力度。适用的协调无线电标准为2.4 GHz Wi-Fi和蓝牙适用EN 300 328 v2.2.2，5 GHz RLAN适用EN 301 893 v2.1.1。符合上述协调标准即可推定符合RED第3.2条。须随产品附上已签署的欧盟合格声明（DoC），并以匈牙利语提供（或附匈牙利语译本）。产品标签须包含国家消费者保护法规定的匈牙利语使用说明和安全标志。MSZT（Magyar Szabványügyi Testület——匈牙利标准化机构）将欧盟协调标准采纳为MSZ EN等效标准。NMHH不认可CCC、SRRC及FCC作为RED/CE的替代认证。
summary.zht: 匈牙利是歐盟成員國，歐盟無線設備指令（RED）2014/53/EU在全國全面適用，無國家豁免。CE標誌是向匈牙利市場投放所有無線電設備的強制要求。負責RED執法和頻譜管理的國家主管機關是NMHH（Nemzeti Média- és Hírközlési Hatóság——匈牙利國家媒體與資訊通訊管理局），依據2003年C號《電子通訊法》（經修訂）設立。NMHH負責頻率頻譜分配、無線電型式核準協調及無線電和電信設備的RED執法。匈牙利是歐盟主要電子製造中心——NMHH執法積極且資源充足，三星、LG和博世在此設有大型製造工廠，進一步加大了本地供應鏈審查力度。適用的協調無線電標準為2.4 GHz Wi-Fi和藍牙適用EN 300 328 v2.2.2，5 GHz RLAN適用EN 301 893 v2.1.1。符合上述協調標準即可推定符合RED第3.2條。須隨產品附上已簽署的歐盟合格聲明（DoC），並以匈牙利語提供（或附匈牙利語譯本）。產品標籤須包含國家消費者保護法規定的匈牙利語使用說明和安全標誌。MSZT（Magyar Szabványügyi Testület——匈牙利標準化機構）將歐盟協調標準採納為MSZ EN等效標準。NMHH不認可CCC、SRRC及FCC作為RED/CE的替代認證。

standards_or_laws: Act C of 2003 on Electronic Communications (Hungary) — transposing RED and establishing NMHH as national competent authority
EN 300 328 v2.2.2 — Wideband transmission systems; data transmission equipment operating in the 2.4 GHz ISM band (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth)
EN 301 893 v2.1.1 — 5 GHz RLAN; requirements for harmonised use of 5 GHz spectrum
MSZ EN 300 328 / MSZ EN 301 893 — Hungarian national adoptions of ETSI harmonised standards (MSZT)

summary.en: In China, wireless transmitters (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth) must obtain SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) Type Approval under the MIIT/NRA framework, administered by the National Radio Administration. The primary domestic technical standards are YD/T 1127 series for 2.4 GHz spread-spectrum devices and GB 15629.11 for Wi-Fi (equivalent to IEEE 802.11). Telecom terminal equipment also requires a MIIT Network Access License (NAL). CCC is mandatory for IT equipment under CNCA-C17-01. Neither SRRC approval nor CCC satisfies the EU RED Art. 3.2 CE marking pathway enforced by NMHH in Hungary.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线发射设备（Wi-Fi、蓝牙）须依据工业和信息化部/国家无线电管理局（NRA）的监管框架取得SRRC（国家无线电管理）型号核准。主要国内技术标准为2.4 GHz扩频设备适用的YD/T 1127系列及Wi-Fi设备适用的GB 15629.11（等同IEEE 802.11）。电信终端设备还须取得工信部进网许可证（NAL）。依据CNCA-C17-01，IT设备须强制进行CCC认证。SRRC批准和CCC均不满足NMHH在匈牙利执行的欧盟RED第3.2条CE标志路径要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線發射設備（Wi-Fi、藍牙）須依據工業和信息化部/國家無線電管理局（NRA）的監管框架取得SRRC（國家無線電管理）型號核准。主要國內技術標準為2.4 GHz擴頻設備適用的YD/T 1127系列及Wi-Fi設備適用的GB 15629.11（等同IEEE 802.11）。電信終端裝置還須取得工信部進網許可證（NAL）。依據CNCA-C17-01，IT設備須強制進行CCC認證。SRRC批准和CCC均不滿足NMHH在匈牙利執行的歐盟RED第3.2條CE標誌路徑要求。

standards_or_laws: MIIT/NRA SRRC Type Approval — mandatory pre-market radio licence for wireless transmitters in China
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — mandatory for telecom terminal equipment sold in China
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — CNCA-C17-01 for IT equipment including Wi-Fi routers and IoT gateways
GB 15629.11 — Information technology; wireless LAN specifications (equivalent to IEEE 802.11)
YD/T 1127 series — Mobile communication terminal radio frequency test methods (MIIT)

gap.en: Chinese SRRC type approval, MIIT NAL, and CCC do not satisfy EU RED Art. 3.2 CE marking requirements enforced by NMHH in Hungary. Fresh EN 300 328 / EN 301 893 test reports from an EU-accredited (or ILAC MRA-member) test laboratory are required. Key technical gaps: (1) 5 GHz DFS (Dynamic Frequency Selection) requirement under EN 301 893 for channels 52–140 is mandatory for RLAN access points throughout the EU including Hungary; (2) EIRP limits under EN 300 328 (100 mW / 20 dBm for 2.4 GHz) must be verified against EN measurement methods; (3) ETSI measurement methodology for channel mask and occupied bandwidth differs from Chinese test protocols. Hungary's role as a key EU electronics manufacturing hub means NMHH conducts rigorous market surveillance; non-compliant products are subject to recall and import ban under RED Art. 40. Hungarian language labelling (instructions, safety warnings) is separately required.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC型号核准、工信部进网许可证和CCC均不满足NMHH在匈牙利执行的欧盟RED第3.2条CE标志要求。须通过欧盟认可（或ILAC MRA成员）检测实验室重新取得EN 300 328 / EN 301 893检测报告。主要技术差距：（1）EN 301 893对52–140信道的5 GHz动态频率选择（DFS）要求，在包括匈牙利在内的欧盟范围内对RLAN接入点为强制要求；（2）须按EN测量方法核验EN 300 328下的EIRP限值（2.4 GHz为100 mW/20 dBm）；（3）信道掩码及占用带宽的ETSI测量方法与中国测试规程不同。匈牙利作为欧盟重要电子制造中心，NMHH开展严格的市场监管；不合规产品依据RED第40条须予召回并禁止进口。匈牙利语标注（使用说明、安全警告）另行要求。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC型號核准、工信部進網許可證和CCC均不滿足NMHH在匈牙利執行的歐盟RED第3.2條CE標誌要求。須通過歐盟認可（或ILAC MRA成員）檢測實驗室重新取得EN 300 328 / EN 301 893檢測報告。主要技術差距：（1）EN 301 893對52–140信道的5 GHz動態頻率選擇（DFS）要求，在包括匈牙利在內的歐盟範圍內對RLAN接入點為強制要求；（2）須按EN測量方法核驗EN 300 328下的EIRP限值（2.4 GHz為100 mW/20 dBm）；（3）信道掩碼及佔用頻寬的ETSI測量方法與中國測試規程不同。匈牙利作為歐盟重要電子製造中心，NMHH開展嚴格的市場監管；不合規產品依據RED第40條須予召回並禁止進口。匈牙利語標注（使用說明、安全警告）另行要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RED 2014/53/EU Art. 3.2; CE marking required before placement on Hungarian market; enforced by NMHH (radio/spectrum and market surveillance); Hungarian language labelling required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC Type Approval (NRA/MIIT) + MIIT NAL (telecom terminals) + CCC (IT equipment) required before sale or import in China

source.publisher: NMHH — Nemzeti Média- és Hírközlési Hatóság (National Media and Infocommunications Authority, Hungary)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] RED Art. 3.2 radio performance CE marking is the primary mandatory requirement for Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT devices entering Hungary. NMHH enforces RED nationally; Hungary's status as a major EU manufacturing hub means enforcement is active and well-resourced. SRRC approval, MIIT NAL, and CCC are not recognised substitutes. Fresh EN 300 328 / EN 301 893 test reports from an EU-accredited laboratory and a signed Declaration of Conformity with Hungarian language labelling are required before first market placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] RED第3.2条无线电性能CE标志是Wi-Fi、蓝牙及物联网设备进入匈牙利的首要强制要求。NMHH在全国执行RED；匈牙利作为欧盟主要制造中心，执法积极且资源充足。SRRC批准、工信部进网许可证和CCC均不被认可为替代认证。须在首次市场投放前提供欧盟认可实验室出具的EN 300 328 / EN 301 893检测报告、已签署的合格声明及匈牙利语产品标注。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] RED第3.2條無線電性能CE標誌是Wi-Fi、藍牙及物聯網裝置進入匈牙利的首要強制要求。NMHH在全國執行RED；匈牙利作為歐盟主要製造中心，執法積極且資源充足。SRRC批准、工信部進網許可證和CCC均不被認可為替代認證。須在首次市場投放前提供歐盟認可實驗室出具的EN 300 328 / EN 301 893檢測報告、已簽署的合格聲明及匈牙利語產品標注。
